description:
ICICI Lombard's Health AdvantEdge is a holistic plan designed to cater to your healthcare needs at all stages. 

The policy also has benefits such as pre-existing disease cover flexibility, domestic and air ambulance etc. It provides an additional cover against 20 critical illnesses including cancer. 

In this video, we have discussed all the details of ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge Latest Version 😊

WATCH OUR VIDEO FOR MORE DETAILS :)
✅  To buy insurance policies, click here - https://hareepatti.com/contact-us/ 

✅ ICICI Lombard Health AdvantEdge 2022 Brochure : https://drive.google.com/file/d/1k2KTegovk9SiJ4uELqrgfKdnwNnHrJRG/view?usp=sharing

✅ ICICI Lombard Be Fit Details  : https://youtu.be/sNCiJKW2QI4
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
For any queries:
📲 WhatsApp : https://wa.me/message/VJCYEKX3EWHOE1
📞 Call : 9650706699
💌  Mail us at: info@hareepatti.com

comments.text: What is mean by incurred claim ratio. Is it good to have less or is it good to have more
comments.author: @akshaydixit4094

comments.text:
Incurred Claim Ratio (ICR) is the ratio of net claims settled by an insurance provider to the net premiums collected in a financial year.

Higher the better !

comments.text: it good to have less
